content:
📜 Reworking the Fallen Angel archetype into a new mechanic.

✔ Instead of being a static archetype, the Fallen Angel is now an unlockable path.
• If a player betrays their faction and succeeds three times, they become a Fallen Angel.
• Fallen Angels have unique abilities & items but suffer permanent social disadvantages.

✔ Alternative Paths for “The Fallen”
• If a player fails three major skill checks, they enter the Exiled State (similar to Ghost status).
• If a player wins three Betrayal Trials, they become a factionless rogue.

📜 Why This Works:
✔ Maintains the thematic weight of betrayal.
✔ Ensures the Fallen Angel path is earned rather than chosen at the start.
✔ Allows for multiple approaches to subversion.

📜 3. Renaming “Marty McFly Disappearance” to a Literary Reference
